onboarding.createTeamDescription: Get started by creating a workspace for your projects.

auth.resetLinkSentDescription: We sent a password reset link to your email. Click the link to reset your password.
auth.magicLinkSentDescription: We sent a magic link to your email. Click the link to sign in.

twoFactor.authenticatorDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
twoFactor.backupCodeDescription: Enter one of your backup codes. Each code can only be used once.

verifyEmail.emailVerifiedDescription: Your email has been verified successfully.
verifyEmail.emailVerifiedFullDescription: Your email has been verified successfully. You can now access all features.
verifyEmail.checkInbox: Check your email inbox for a verification link.
verifyEmail.clickLink: Click the link to verify your email address.
verifyEmail.emailSentDescription: Verification email has been sent to your inbox.
verifyEmail.signInFirstToResend: Please sign in first to resend verification.

magicLink.title: Magic Link Sign In
magicLink.notEnabledDescription: Magic link authentication is not enabled for this application.
magicLink.invalidLinkDescription: The magic link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
magicLink.signedInDescription: You have been signed in successfully.
magicLink.signedInRedirecting: You have been signed in successfully. Redirecting to dashboard...
magicLink.expiredHint: The magic link may have expired. Request a new one from the login page.

teams.slugValidation: Slug must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
teams.maxTeamsReached: You have reached the maximum number of teams.
teams.memberRemovedDescription: Member has been removed from the team.
teams.name: Name
teams.logoInvalidUrl: Logo must be a valid URL
teams.permissionDeniedDescription: Only team owners and admins can update settings.

account.avatarInvalidUrl: Avatar must be a valid URL
account.passwordDescription: Update your password to keep your account secure.
account.passwordChangedDescription: Your password has been changed successfully.

passkey.name: Passkey name
passkey.passkeyAddedDescription: Your new passkey has been registered.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.description: Manage your active sessions across devices.

admin.passwordResetSentDescription: A password reset email has been sent to {email}.
admin.sessionsRevokedDescription: All sessions have been revoked. The user will need to log in again.
admin.impersonatingDescription: You are now logged in as this user.
admin.bulkPasswordResetSentDescription: Password reset emails sent to {count} users.
admin.failedToBulkSendPasswordReset: Failed to send password reset emails
admin.confirmBan: Are you sure you want to ban this user?
admin.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove this member?
admin.confirmBulkAction: Are you sure you want to perform this action on {count} members?

emailLogs.title: Email Logs
emailLogs.description: View all authentication emails sent to team members.
